title: MCP Server Registration
description: JSON format for entropic_register_mcp_server() and the external_servers config section. Defines how to connect an external MCP server to the engine at runtime.

command.description: Executable path for the MCP server process. Can be absolute or resolved via PATH.

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the server process.

env.description: Environment variables set for the server process. Merged with the parent environment.
